dialogos.texto_en: Would you like to view the game tutorial?
I'll explain how to play this game, big bro.
First, you'll have to choose\nwho to confess to.
Your confession choice will greatly affect the story.
Your choices within will affect your 'Futaro Points.'
Depending on how many 'Futaro Points' you have,\nyou will either get\nthe Good Ending or the Normal Ending.
Ichika-san, Nino-san, Miku-san, Yotsuba-san,\nand Itsuki-san.\nAfter seeing all five endings...
You'll be able to choose one more route.
(The type of ending doesn't matter.\n By seeing either the Good or Normal Ending\n for each quintuplet...)
You can save and load your progress\nby opening the commands.
You can also view the manual, so make sure to study up.
Big bro,\nyou've decided on your answer, haven't you?
No matter what the future holds,\nI believe you can push through.\nGood luck!
